combined_text: Will Boeing Split Its Stock in 2018? Dan Caplinger ( TMFGalagan)Nov 20, 2017 at 8:32AMDemand for commercial airliners has never been higher, and Boeing ( NYSE: BA) has claimed its fair share of orders from airlines and other purchasers flush with cash from the industry's success.
